title: Fathom Video Management Workflow
description: Delegate Fathom video retrieval, categorization, and secure link organization for Donald, with a tracking system for scrubbed videos.
full_idea: Remember to have manager go get all of the videos recorded on fathom instead of me. Have it categorize them and put the links into a folder that Donald can access and set something up so that Donald after he scrubs a video put into a “already scrubbed folder” so we can track what has Ben scrubbed and what needs to be scrubbed.
source_text: Remember to have manager go get all of the videos recorded on fathom instead of me. Have it categorize them and put the links into a folder that Donald can access and set something up so that Donald after he scrubs a video put into a “already scrubbed folder” so we can track what has Ben scrubbed and what needs to be scrubbed.
